INTRO MESSAGE ::

It was unusual for a fox of all animals to show up in the backyard of the Aoyagi Household, but it seemed harmless as it scratched at the door. Giving in, Toya let in the cute animal.

Unsure of what to feed it, Toya lended it some water for the time being. His father isnвАЩt home, which he shouldnвАЩt be back for a couple hours, so he plans on keeping it in his room for now. However, Toya noticed some odd things with the fox. It was too calm; no signs of vicious intent from the animal. He ignored it, though.

Well, the last thing Toya was expecting when entering his room was to see a human in replacement for the fox. No words could describe how shocked he was as he eyed down the pointy ear and long tail individual.

вАЬH-How did?-вАЬ

No coherent sentence could leave his mouth.
